openclaw_update.why: 当前版本落后 5 个 patch，且新版包含 Feishu 去重、cron 死锁、gateway 稳定性与浏览器/会话修复，和你现在的日常使用场景直接相关。
changes: 默认模型测试基线升级到 GPT-5.4
fix(cron): 防止 isolated cron 嵌套 lane deadlock
fix(feishu): 事件级去重，避免重复回复
fix(gateway): bound unanswered client requests，并恢复 control-ui 连接分类/鉴权相关修复
fix(session): reset 时保留 lastAccountId / lastThreadId
fix(browser): 加固 batch act dispatch 与 session lifecycle

must_read.title: GitHub: How Squad runs coordinated AI agents inside your repository
must_read.summary: 反直觉点：多智能体不一定先上重 orchestration，repo-native + decisions.md 这种可审计共享记忆，反而更适合 builder 快速起步。

must_read.title: If You Want to Build Agent Systems, You Need to Lose Your REST-Style Intuitions
must_read.summary: 反直觉点：agent interface 不是 API endpoint，而是 capability surface + delegation surface + policy boundary。

must_read.title: HiDreamClaw launches as the first image-and-video native Claw
must_read.summary: 对多模态创业最关键：通用 agent 正在让位给 vertical agent，真正价值来自嵌入创作工作流而不是“能聊天”。

worth_a_look.title: Multi-Agent Architectures: The Power of Coordination
worth_a_look.summary: builder 视角很实：hierarchical / collaborative / sequential 三种架构下，state schema 与 least privilege 比 prompt 更重要。

worth_a_look.title: Meta REA: The Autonomous AI Agent Accelerating Ads Ranking Innovation
worth_a_look.summary: 长周期 agent 的启发：真正护城河不是一次性生成，而是 hibernate-and-wake 持续跑多天工作流。

worth_a_look.title: NVIDIA: Building the AI Grid with NVIDIA
worth_a_look.summary: 多模态落地的硬约束越来越清楚：voice / vision agent 的核心瓶颈已从训练转向推理延迟、抖动和 token economics。

wildcard.title: GitHub Changelog: Secret scanning in AI coding agents via the GitHub MCP Server
wildcard.summary: 一个很实用的小信号：安全能力开始直接变成 agent 的工具，而不只是 CI 里的后置检查。
